title: Need Help with my Inventory on Monday

posts.author: EMP (Sean Turner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I work for a battery manufacture and I am really trying to get my business more organized , I have been working on the same issue for a week now and just can figure it out.

Problem
I want to track inventory the issue it my orders contain bundle items.

I have everything set up and it seems to be working well but I am not able to deduct the multiple inventories with out showing the stocks gty. on my board. I know there is not a certain way to hide columns for different groups but is there a way to create a formula to help fix my issue?

I am new to this Monday app but so far I am loving it. I am willing to hire a professional to help me set this up correctly.

posts.author: MondayMex (Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m delighted to be of assistance. I am a part of the Cinapsys team, a Monday Certified partner, and we proudly serve over 100 Monday.com customers.

To get started, please visit this link: Google Calendar . By scheduling an appointment, we can take a closer look at your boards and determine whether you simply need some free advice or if your objectives require professional services.

Looking forward to connecting with you soon.

Warm regards,

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @EMP ,

Welcome to the monday community !

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out! At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 5 years of individual experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing customized solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

We have a wealth of experience in creating specialized solutions that are according to business and monday best practices, and our team of experts can really take your processes to the next level!

Your use case sound very interesting, and we would be glad to assist!

Please do schedule a Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements! Alternatively, if none of the available time slots work out for you, please contact us at info@thespelas.com so we can do our best to accommodate you.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

P.S. Meetings for this week are unavailable since our team is at a major international conference.

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
